confidence_rationale: Video classification is unambiguous: this is educational/instructional content with narration context, multiple task demonstrations (Endoloop Task 3 featured), anatomical illustrations, technical diagrams, and expert instructor presentation. No single trainee performance to score; content is curriculum material.
technique_summary: Comprehensive instructional video covering FLS fundamentals with focus on instrument handling and core laparoscopic skills. Features expert demonstrations, anatomical context, and technical guidance for proper technique.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper grip and ring handle positioning for laparoscopic forceps
Endoloop deployment technique and placement precision
Correct loop cinching and appendage ligation
Instrument approach angles and elevation geometry
Three-dimensional spatial positioning in endoscopic surgery
verbal_cues: Expert surgeon addressing fundamentals of laparoscopic technique
Emphasis on proper instrument control and ergonomics
common_errors_addressed: Improper loop placement away from marked target line
Inadequate loop cinching leading to loose ligation

video_notes: This is a professional educational module from Incision covering FLS fundamentals. Multiple task demonstrations are included, with Task 3 (Endoloop) being prominently featured. The content includes bench-top trainer demonstrations, live surgical footage, anatomical illustrations, and technical diagrams to reinforce proper technique. No individual trainee performance is being assessed.
